  • Uses of IDataPanelListener in controller.contracts

    Subinterfaces of IDataPanelListener in controller.contracts
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    IChecklistPageListener
    Defines a listener interface for handling user interactions on a checklist page.
    interface 
    IWorkspacePageListener
    Defines an alias of ICollectionPageListener for handling user interactions on the workspace page.

    Constructors in view.panels with parameters of type IDataPanelListener
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AbstractDataPanel(DataT dataToObserve, IDataPanelListener<DataT> controller)
    Constructs a new AbstractDataPanel, registering event options and handling null checks on the provided controller.

    Creates a new task text panel with the specified task and controller.
